summary: SEO Health Score feature testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests pass (100%). Fixed 500 error for invalid user IDs. Frontend: All features working - Home widget shows score (46/100, 'Fair'), /seo-health page loads with score circle, 5 factor breakdown with progress bars, profile checklists, detailed metrics, Quick Wins tips, and My Score/Team tabs. Team tab correctly shows 'No team members found' for user without store_id.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend health-score endpoint now validates user_id format before ObjectId conversion to prevent 500 errors
Score calculation correctly sums 5 factors (profile=17, reviews=12, distribution=8, visibility=5, freshness=4) = 46
Tips are sorted by points (highest impact first) and capped at 6 tips
Team endpoint returns empty array for invalid/nonexistent store_ids rather than error
Frontend seo-health.tsx handles loading state, renders all factor cards with progress bars
Home widget loads seoScore in useFocusEffect and displays with correct grade color
Hub menu has SEO Health under My Performance section (line 582 in more.tsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Health Score feature is complete. Backend endpoints: GET /api/seo/health-score/{user_id} returns score structure with total_score, grade, grade_color, factors (5 items with score/max/label/checks/details), tips array. GET /api/seo/health-score/team/{store_id} returns team leaderboard array. Forest Ward (test user) has score 46 'Fair'. Team endpoint works with store_id 69a0b7095fddcede09591668 (5 members). Frontend: Home widget clickable → /seo-health page. Hub > My Performance has SEO Health menu item. Score breakdown shows all 5 factors with visual progress bars and detailed metrics.
